notes: A subset Delta of Gamma is an unsatisfiability witness iff Delta is unsatisfiable (def:unsatisfiable-set) -- the sole load-bearing condition. The subset relation Delta subset Gamma is ambient typing (Rule 3): it merely locates Delta in Gamma and the claim rests only on unsatisfiability, so no def:subset edge is needed. Correctly contrasts 0035, where finiteness IS load-bearing.
